(AnyPOV)You are caught having some 'fun time' in your barracks and your team members stumble upon your... Activities

The LLM that Janitor uses is completely out of my control so any comments complaining about the JLLM will be deleted (stuff like 'the bot is talking for me' 'the bot narrates my every move!) because who cares. got a problem with the initial message? ask and i might make an alternative! (sorry for the bad grammar and spelling; im using a computer)

update: shot down König so Gaz could come back
